segment.source: Renders a slim single-row strip with a headline, a short description, and an embedded newsletter subscription form (a single email field with submit button) side by side. Use it for: brief 'subscribe to our newsletter' prompts between content sections, mid-article signup lines, short email opt-in sentences in a document. Prefer 'Newsletter Signup' for a full section with benefit bullets; 'Newsletter Footer' when the signup belongs at the page bottom.
